title: BoardGameGeek Hotness
content:
1. **Dungeon Crawler Carl: Unstoppable**
*2026*
The beloved solo/co-op card-crafting game, now with Dungeon Crawler Carl!
![Dungeon Crawler Carl: Unstoppable](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-24/toplist/bgg_954c6e0b.png)

2. **Excursions**
*2027*
Carefully plan itineraries to thrill guests on out-of-this-world vacations.
![Excursions](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-24/toplist/bgg_a3afa349.jpg)

3. **Lairs**
*2026*
Build a devious dungeon and explore your rival's creation. 
![Lairs](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-24/toplist/bgg_dfdf002c.jpg)

4. **Diplomacy: The Golden Blade**
*2026*
Strategy, negotiation and backstabbing in 15 minutes per player!
![Diplomacy: The Golden Blade](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-24/toplist/bgg_d05c0c5b.jpg)

5. **Unstoppable**
*2025*
Gather your allies and sharpen your skills, for the darkest days are yet to come.
![Unstoppable](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-24/toplist/bgg_8a363541.jpg)

6. **The Lord of the Rings: Fate of the Fellowship**
*2025*
As members of The Fellowship, embark on a journey to save—or doom—Middle-earth.
![The Lord of the Rings: Fate of the Fellowship](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-24/toplist/bgg_3c719b27.png)

7. **Eternal Decks**
*2025*
Can you solve each stage before your deck runs out?
![Eternal Decks](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-24/toplist/bgg_2927f5ab.png)

8. **Nippon: Zaibatsu**
*2026*
Control conglomerates of companies driving Japan’s economy.
![Nippon: Zaibatsu](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-24/toplist/bgg_ff9ddaba.jpg)

9. **Arcs**
*2024*
Rule the galaxy with your court, fleet, and cities.
![Arcs](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-24/toplist/bgg_b71109f9.png)

10. **Nemesis: Retaliation**
*2025*
Highly trained marines enter an alien nest with strict orders and advanced tools.
![Nemesis: Retaliation](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-24/toplist/bgg_745363a4.jpg)

11. **Brass: Pittsburgh**
*2027*
Take part in the United States' late 19th-century industrial boom.
![Brass: Pittsburgh](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-24/toplist/bgg_3044bdf1.png)

12. **SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence**
*2024*
Search for signs of alien life by launching probes and analyzing distant signals.
![SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-24/toplist/bgg_eed1e97d.jpg)

13. **Galactic Cruise**
*2025*
Build and launch ships to send guests on luxurious space vacations.
![Galactic Cruise](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-24/toplist/bgg_10589e59.jpg)

14. **Onward**
*2025*
Draft champions, slay monsters, and rally minions to destroy the enemy Nexus.
![Onward](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-24/toplist/bgg_4045d4b3.jpg)

15. **Ark Nova**
*2021*
Plan and build a modern, scientifically managed zoo to support conservation projects.
![Ark Nova](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-24/toplist/bgg_9959937d.jpg)

16. **Brass: Birmingham**
*2018*
Build networks, grow industries, and navigate the world of the Industrial Revolution.
![Brass: Birmingham](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-24/toplist/bgg_9c82eec1.jpg)

17. **The Old King's Crown**
*2025*
Out-manoeuvre your rivals as you vie for control of an ancient, crumbling kingdom.
![The Old King's Crown](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-24/toplist/bgg_e0b9a4a5.jpg)

18. **Root**
*2018*
Decide the fate of the woodland as asymmetric factions fight for contrasting goals.
![Root](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-24/toplist/bgg_d17d338b.jpg)

19. **Toy Battle**
*2025*
Send forth an army of toys to conquer territories.
![Toy Battle](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-24/toplist/bgg_57d7e1b6.jpg)

20. **Heat: Pedal to the Metal**
*2022*
Push your car to the limit in the pursuit of victory, but don’t overheat!
![Heat: Pedal to the Metal](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-24/toplist/bgg_d4c1e88f.jpg)

21. **Spirit Island**
*2017*
Island Spirits join forces using elemental powers to defend their home from invaders.
![Spirit Island](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-24/toplist/bgg_c484826a.jpg)

22. **Speakeasy**
*2025*
Earn money running a Manhattan speakeasy business during Prohibition.
![Speakeasy](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-24/toplist/bgg_f8117c1c.jpg)

23. **The Elder Scrolls: Betrayal of the Second Era**
*2025*
Upgrade your character and gear up to explore the many regions of Tamriel.
![The Elder Scrolls: Betrayal of the Second Era](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-24/toplist/bgg_cb21d675.jpg)

24. **Harmonies**
*2024*
Create your own landscape and habitats to welcome animals.
![Harmonies](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-24/toplist/bgg_553fe948.jpg)

25. **Magical Athlete**
*2025*
Pit a cast of crazy characters against each other in a madcap race to the finish.
![Magical Athlete](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-24/toplist/bgg_d369cf20.png)
author: boardgamegeek.com

title: BoardGameGeek Bestsellers (Fallback to Plays)
content:
1. **Flip 7**
*15 months on the list*
Score the cards in front of you, or take another card, risking everything you hold?
![Flip 7](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-24/toplist/bgg_e3f5612c.jpg)

2. **Harmonies**
*23 months on the list*
Create your own landscape and habitats to welcome animals.
![Harmonies](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-24/toplist/bgg_fb892694.jpg)

3. **Castle Combo**
*18 months on the list*
Combine medieval villagers and castle dwellers to score points.
![Castle Combo](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-24/toplist/bgg_1d32e671.jpg)

4. **Ark Nova**
*51 months on the list*
Plan and build a modern, scientifically managed zoo to support conservation projects.
![Ark Nova](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-24/toplist/bgg_e1690e5f.jpg)

5. **Wingspan**
*87 months on the list*
Attract a beautiful and diverse collection of birds to your wildlife preserve.
![Wingspan](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-24/toplist/bgg_80d92d5f.jpg)

6. **Bomb Busters**
*11 months on the list*
Players defuse bombs by deducing and cutting unseen wires of different values.
![Bomb Busters](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-24/toplist/bgg_45877c80.png)

7. **Heat: Pedal to the Metal**

8. **Azul**

9. **Terraforming Mars**

10. **Sea Salt & Paper**

A few delicate Origami-style illustrations and a whole marine universe comes to life!
![Sea Salt & Paper](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-24/toplist/bgg_85ff5ab9.jpg)

11. **Forest Shuffle**
*30 months on the list*
Curate a diverse ecology with strategic flora and fauna, winter is coming!
![Forest Shuffle](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-24/toplist/bgg_21210215.jpg)

12. **Cascadia**
*56 months on the list*
Create the most harmonious ecosystem as you puzzle together habitats and wildlife.
![Cascadia](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-24/toplist/bgg_5700139e.jpg)

13. **Lost Ruins of Arnak**
*63 months on the list*
Explore an island to find resources and discover the lost ruins of Arnak.
![Lost Ruins of Arnak](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-24/toplist/bgg_ac6a4856.jpg)

14. **SETI: Search for Extraterrestrial Intelligence**

15. **Faraway**
*23 months on the list*
Explore a mysterious land and fulfill quests on your way back.
![Faraway](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Derushir/Kepek/main/2026-04-24/toplist/bgg_9c6edab2.png)

16. **Sky Team**
